heading: Travel expenses
label: 3617 Travel expenses
text: While away from their homes, regular places of business, or official stations in performance of services under this part, members of the Board of the Commission and the representatives of the United States on the Consultative Committee referred to in and on the Joint Commission on the Environment referred to in shall be allowed travel or transportation expenses, including per diem in lieu of subsistence, in the same manner as persons employed intermittently in Government service are allowed expenses under .section 3615 of this titlesection 3616 of this titlesection 5703 of title 5
